iot.mitigationaction.actionparams.AddThi.Docs: Specifies the group to which you want to add the devices.

iot.mitigationaction.actionparams.Enable.Docs: Specifies the logging level and the role with permissions for logging. You cannot specify a logging level of `DISABLED`.

iot.mitigationaction.actionparams.Publis.Docs: Specifies the topic to which the finding should be published.

iot.mitigationaction.actionparams.Replac.Docs: Replaces the policy version with a default or blank policy. You specify the template name. Only a value of `BLANK_POLICY` is currently supported.

iot.mitigationaction.actionparams.Update.Docs: Specifies the new state for the CA certificate. Only a value of `DEACTIVATE` is currently supported.
Specifies the new state for a device certificate. Only a value of `DEACTIVATE` is currently supported.
